arts.ttl: Club Brugge v Aston Villa: Champions League last 16, first leg – live
arts.sum: Champions League news from the 5.45pm GMT kick-off Live scores | Read today’s Football Daily | And email Will Ben Fisher and John McGinn combine to provide you with some preview material. A huge evening lies ahead for Aston Villa in Brugge. This is the Champions League last 16 and the favour has been relatively kind to the Premier League side who would expect to defeat their Belgian counterparts over two legs but they have already lost in Brugge this season. That loss was the result of some mild comedy/incompetence, depending on your point of you. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: 'That could do them': Paul Merson sends Aston Villa warning as he predicts who'll go through in CL tie vs Club Brugge
arts.sum: Aston Villa will get their Champions League last-16 campaign under way on Tuesday evening as they take on Club Brugge in their first leg in...

arts.ttl: Aston Villa have work to do to convince player – Monchi call in January may not be enough
arts.sum: Aston Villa may need to work hard if they want to sign goalkeeper Álvaro Valles in the summer transfer window, with insistence that he’s going to return to Real Betis. Estadio Deportivo cover the player today as he prepares for the summer as a free agent after leaving Las Palmas on February 10th. arts.ttl: Club Brugge vs Aston Villa LIVE: Champions League team news and line-ups ahead of last-16 clash
arts.sum: Unai Emery’s men impressed during the league phase and must now fight past the Belgian side

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford feelings made clear as Bruges bar footage shows Aston Villa takeover
arts.sum: Aston Villa are taking over in Bruges this week, ahead of the Champions League last 16 first leg clash with Club Brugge in Belgium this evening (KO 17:45). Aston Villa take on Club Brugge in the Champions League and Manchester United loanee Marcus Rashford is in line to feature

arts.ttl: Aston Villa quoted £41m transfer fee for defender wanted by Liverpool amid Virgil van Dijk doubt
arts.sum: Koulierakis, who at 21 already has 11 caps for his country, scored twice on his Wolfsburg debut in a Champions League qualifier against Borac Banja Luka back in July. Villa, meanwhile, will revisit their own centre half department again in the summer; Tyrone Mings will move into the final year of his contract, while Axel Disasi's loan spell from Chelsea will end following the culmination of the season.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford trap warning as Aston Villa told to be 'wary' over Man Utd deal
arts.sum: Manchester United star Marcus Rashford has enjoyed a bright start to life with Aston Villa after joining on loan until the end of the season and both clubs have been sent an interesting message Aston Villa have been told to think carefully about signing Marcus Rashford permanently despite being told he can be the "best player in the Premier League ".

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford behaviour proves ex-Man Utd star's theory right as Jadon Sancho backed
arts.sum: A former Manchester United star believes players like Marcus Rashford and Jadon Sancho can't wait to leave Old Trafford due to the immense pressure of being at a high profile club

arts.ttl: Aston Villa interested in bringing player back – Star keen on PL return as price tag emerges
arts.sum: Douglas Luiz has had a disappointing time since leaving Aston Villa in the summer transfer window. He’s failed to establish himself as a regular at Juventus, playing only 795 minutes in all competitions. arts.ttl: “Not aggressive enough” – Player picked out as Aston Villa weaknesses listed
arts.sum: Youri Tielemans is being held aloft as a star in Belgium, but one aspect of his game could be exploited by Club Brugge when they take on Aston Villa in the Champions League this week.
